cancel.title: Cancel Subscription
cancel.confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel your Premium subscription?
cancel.activeUntil: Your subscription will remain active until {{date}}.
cancel.errorToast: Failed to cancel subscription. Please try again.

restore.title: Restore subscription
restore.confirm: Are you sure you want to restore your Premium subscription?
restore.errorToast: Failed to restore subscription. Please try again.

canceled.title: Subscription Cancelled
canceled.expiry: Your subscription has been cancelled and will expire on {{date}}. After that, you'll be switched to the Basic plan.
canceled.canRestore: You can restore your subscription at any time before it expires.

expired.title: Subscription Expired
expired.description: Your subscription has expired. You've been switched to the Basic plan.
